plentry.pd:
Set the backup name, specify the replication group, backup and other parameters.
GroupID Backup copy group ID specified, the default is all replication groups. GroupID:1000 or GroupID:[1000, 1001]
GroupName Backup copy group name is specified, the default is all replication groups. GroupName:"data1" or GroupName:["data1", "data2"]
Name Backup name, default "YYYY-MM-DD-HH:mm:SS" Backup name time format. Name:"backup-2014-1-1"
Path Backup path, the default configuration parameters for the specified backup path.The path supports wildcards (g%: group name, h%: host name, s%:service name). Path:"/opt/sequoiadb/backup/%g"
IsSubDir The above Path configuration parameter configuration parameters are specified for the backup path subdircetory, the default is false. IsSubDir:false
Prefix Backup prefix, support wildcards (g%,h%,s%), The default is empty. Prefix:"%g_bk_"
EnableDataDir Date subdirectories feature is turned on, if the current date is automatically rurned on create a subdirectory "YYYY-MM-DD", the default according to false EnableDataDir:false
Description Backup description Description:"First backup"
EnsureInc Whether to open an incremental backup, the default is false. EnsureInc:false
OverWrite Backup is covered with the same name exists, the default is false. OverWrite:false
